raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a formal complaint against Citi Bank Credit card regarding their refusal to fairly resolve a dispute concerning unauthorized charges made on my account. Despite multiple attempts to reach a resolution, my case has been unfairly denied, and the company has failed to address my concerns adequately. 
Complaint Details : Disputed Transaction Amount : {$510.00} Total Transaction Amount : {$840.00} Transaction Date : XX/XX/XXXX Merchant : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX Issue Summary : Unauthorized Charge : During my visit to a dental clinic in XXXX, the merchant took my credit card without my consent and processed charges I did not authorize. 
No Signed Agreement : I did not sign any receipt or consent form for the additional services that were billed to me. 
Merchant Misconduct : The merchant 's payment machine was malfunctioning, and I was unaware of the exact amount being charged at the time of the transaction.

Failure to Provide Receipts : The merchant initially refused to provide a receipt, and when they eventually did, the details were incorrect.

Credit Card Companys Unfair Handling : I filed a dispute with Citi Bank Credit card on XX/XX/XXXX, providing all relevant details and requesting a chargeback for the unauthorized amount. Despite the clear evidence, my dispute was denied. 
Lack of Response : I followed up on XX/XX/XXXX and again recently, but the company has failed to respond or reconsider my case. 
Requested Resolution : I request that CFPB investigate this matter and ensure that Citi Bank credit card properly re-evaluates my dispute and refunds the unauthorized amount of {$510.00}. I believe their handling of my case has been unfair, and I seek a just resolution under consumer protection laws.
